description: "Improve an existing Copilot skill using web research and best practices"
agent: "skill-improver-ghcp"

Analyze and improve the skill named: $ARGUMENTS

Research current best practices online, compare them against the skill's current instructions and templates, and suggest targeted improvements. Show a structured improvement report with specific proposed changes before applying anything.
